name: Overmind
oneliner: AI agent supervision and monitoring platform built by a former MI5 officer, targeting regulated industries
finserv: Targets fintech, legal, and healthcare — regulated-industry DNA; agentic AI supervision specifically for compliance-heavy contexts
team: Founded by former MI5 officer; security/intelligence background implies deep expertise in monitoring, audit, and compliance
thesis: Overmind is building the supervision layer that every regulated AI agent deployment will need. As You positions itself as the infrastructure layer for agentic AI, having a partner that provides production monitoring, audit trails, and safety guarantees for agents is essential. The MI5 pedigree adds credibility in security-critical contexts. London HQ aligns with the Europe-preferred geography.
